title: phaius × hybridus
intro: Phaius × hybridus, also known as the hybrid Phaius, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phaius × hybridus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Phaius × hybridus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds.
